# aikit embedder coverage

Every model below is certified against its HuggingFace reference at **cosine
‚â• 0.9999** (all currently land at 1.000000) with a hidden-state gate and a
break-it-first check ‚Äî perturb the pooling, position offset, or routing and the
gate must go red. A model is not listed until its gate is green.

Generated from the registry in `encoder/coverage_test.go`, which is itself
checked against the real checkpoints (declared pooling and dimensions are read
back from the loader when the weights are present). Regenerate with
`go test ./encoder -run EmbedderCoverage -update`.

| Model | Architecture | Loader | Pooling | Tokenizer | Dims | Truncatable | Gate |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2` | BERT | `LoadBERT` | mean | WordPiece | 384 | ‚Äî | `TestBERT_parity` |
| `nomic-ai/CodeRankEmbed` | nomic-bert (RoPE, SwiGLU) | `Load` | cls | WordPiece | 768 | ‚Äî | `TestGoldenFixture_cosine` |
| `BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5` | BERT | `LoadBERT` | cls | WordPiece | 384 | ‚Äî | `TestBGE_parity` |
| `nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5` | nomic-bert (RoPE, SwiGLU) | `Load` | mean | WordPiece | 768 | 768‚Üí64 | `TestNomicEmbed_parity` |
| `FacebookAI/xlm-roberta-base` | XLM-R | `LoadBERT` | ‚Äî | Unigram | 768 | ‚Äî | `TestXLMR_forwardParity` |
| `intfloat/multilingual-e5-base` | XLM-R | `LoadBERT` | mean | Unigram | 768 | ‚Äî | `TestMultilingualE5_parity` |
| `BAAI/bge-m3` | XLM-R | `LoadBERT` | cls | Unigram | 1024 | ‚Äî | `TestBGEM3_parity` |
| `nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v2-moe` | nomic-bert + MoE (top-2 of 8) | `Load` | mean | Unigram | 768 | 768‚Üí256 | `TestNomicMoE_parity` |

**Truncatable** is the Matryoshka range: only models trained with Matryoshka
Representation Learning may have their vectors shortened. Slicing any other row
returns a unit-length vector that looks fine and retrieves worse, so a serve
layer must not honor a `dimensions` request blindly ‚Äî check this column.

## Why each row is here

- **`sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2`** ‚Äî the baseline BERT embedder
- **`nomic-ai/CodeRankEmbed`** ‚Äî the original rotary/SwiGLU path
- **`BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5`** ‚Äî CLS pooling read from 1_Pooling, not assumed
- **`nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5`** ‚Äî declared mean pooling on the rotary path
- **`FacebookAI/xlm-roberta-base`** ‚Äî position-id offset (pad+1); bare LM, so forward-only
- **`intfloat/multilingual-e5-base`** ‚Äî first multilingual embedder certified full-stack
- **`BAAI/bge-m3`** ‚Äî CLS multilingual; bare-Metaspace tokenizer variant
- **`nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v2-moe`** ‚Äî mixture-of-experts FFN on odd layers

## Not in this table

`encoder` also ships SPLADE (sparse lexical) and a cross-encoder reranker, both
parity-gated in their own tests. They are excluded here because "pooling" and a
single dense width do not describe them.

The checkpoints themselves are gitignored (they are large); the gates skip when a
model is absent, so CI runs the freshness check without weights.
